description: You are a soil scientist at a county NRCS office. Format the raw field notes and lab results for a 160-acre parcel in Story County, Iowa, located in /home/ga/Documents/soil_survey_report.odt, into a professional USDA-style soil survey report. The final document must feature a bold title (minimum 14pt), Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles for sections, and justified body text (minimum 11pt). Convert the tabular data for soil horizon properties, chemical analysis, and management recommendations into tables. Include a Table of Contents at the beginning and define page margins. Save the completed document.

expected_h1_sections: Site Description and Land Use History
body_alignment_samples: The subject parcel is located in Story County
Soil cores were extracted using a hydraulic probe
Management practices should focus on building
metadata.source: USDA Web Soil Survey and NRCS documentation standards
